detectors.description:
QiibeeToken.setMigrationMaster(address) (QiibeeToken.sol#1461-1467) should emit an event for: 
	- migrationMaster = _master (QiibeeToken.sol#1465)

Reentrancy in QiibeeToken.setMigrationAgent(address) (QiibeeToken.sol#1373-1383):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(MigrationAgentInterface(_agent).qbxSourceToken() == address(this)) (QiibeeToken.sol#1375)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- migrationAgent = _agent (QiibeeToken.sol#1381)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in QiibeeToken.migrate(uint256) (QiibeeToken.sol#1395-1415):

	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Migrate(msg.sender,migrationAgent,_value) (QiibeeToken.sol#1413)

detectors.description:
QiibeeToken.migrate(uint256) (QiibeeToken.sol#1395-1415) uses timestamp for comparisons

	- require(bool)(_value <= transferableTokens(msg.sender,uint64(now))) (QiibeeToken.sol#1403)
